headline: England — is this finally the year? Kane, Bellingham, Saka under Tuchel
summary: England arrive at WC 2026 among the favorites under Thomas Tuchel, carrying the familiar 'is this finally the year?' weight after decades without a World Cup. Harry Kane captains a record-equalling third World Cup (and is the all-time England scorer), Jude Bellingham wears the No. 10 despite an indifferent Real Madrid season, and Tuchel has publicly demanded more goals from Bukayo Saka.
angles: Kane is England's greatest scorer with zero trophies — does 2026 fix that?
Is THIS finally the year it comes home, or the same old heartbreak?
Bellingham's club season was rough — can he still be England's difference-maker?
Tuchel told Saka to add goals — does he deliver on the biggest stage?
